# README Image Placement

Put README screenshots in this folder with these exact names:

- `.github/screenshot-main.png` (recommended width: 1800px)
- `.github/screenshot-dashboard.png` (recommended width: 1200px)
- `.github/screenshot-history.png` (recommended width: 1200px)
- `.github/screenshot-settings.png` (recommended width: 1200px)
- `.github/screenshot-onboarding.png` (recommended width: 1200px)

Tips:

- Use PNG format for crisp UI text.
- Keep 16:10 or 16:9 aspect ratio for consistent layout.
- Capture on light mode if possible (GitHub default background contrast).
